title: oxalis salteri
intro: Oxalis salteri, also known as the Violet Wood Sorrel, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Oxalidaceae family. The plant is native to South Africa and is known for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Oxalis salteri include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
